transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Jennifer Wu. I'm calling because my ceiling fan has no power. Dispatcher: Hi Jennifer, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Eaton, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 314 Birch Lane. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out today if possible. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Eaton ceiling fan, an older one, 15 years
